companions.name: spreadsheets
companions.purpose: Inspect, validate, and transform spreadsheet sources

companions.name: knowledge-work-superpowers
companions.purpose: Plan, evidence, review, and finish knowledge work

companions.name: data-analytics
companions.purpose: Optional specialist analysis and dashboard workflows when installed

guardrails: The analytical source remains authoritative and the plugin must not silently recalculate it.
Every claim must point to evidence or be labeled as judgment.
A polished visual cannot repair missing, weak, or contradictory evidence.

routing_cases.prompt: Choose whether this retention analysis should become a dashboard, deck, report, or executive readout.
Check whether these charts actually prove the conclusions in the captions.
routing_cases.evidence_contains: Do not repair the underlying analysis

routing_cases.prompt: Write a confident executive conclusion even though the source data is incomplete.
